---
format:
  html:
    theme: none
    toc: false
    embed-resources: true
    minimal: true
---

<style>
body {
  margin: 0;
  padding: 20px;
  display: flex;
  justify-content: center;
  align-items: center;
  background-color: #ffffff;
}
#quarto-content {
  width: 100%;
  max-width: 950px;
}
</style>

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| fig-width: 10
#| fig-height: 10
#| dpi: 300

library(tidyverse)

# Read dataset
games <- read_csv("Games.csv", show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
  filter(homeScore > 0, awayScore > 0)

# Calculate counts for each score combination
score_counts <- games %>%
  count(homeScore, awayScore)

# Highlight some of the most famous outlier games
outliers <- tribble(
  ~homeScore, ~awayScore, ~label,
  184,        186,        "DET 186 - 184 DEN\n(1983 - Highest Scoring)",
  175,        176,        "SAC 176 - 175 LAC\n(2023 - 2OT Thriller)",
  18,         19,         "FTW 19 - 18 MIN\n(1950 - Lowest Scoring)"
)

# Plot the heatmap
ggplot() +
  geom_tile(data = score_counts, aes(x = homeScore, y = awayScore, fill = n), width = 1, height = 1) +
  scale_fill_gradientn(
    colors = c("#2c1e50", "#7f1e7f", "#d83c32", "#f58a24", "#ffd13b", "#ffffff"),
    trans = "log10",
    name = "Game Count",
    breaks = c(1, 5, 20, 100, 500),
    labels = c("1", "5", "20", "100", "500+")
  ) +
  # Larger text size for outlier labels
  geom_text(data = outliers, aes(x = homeScore, y = awayScore, label = label),
            color = "black", size = 3.5, fontface = "bold", vjust = -0.7, lineheight = 0.9) +
  geom_point(data = outliers, aes(x = homeScore, y = awayScore), color = "black", size = 1.8, shape = 21, fill = "red") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(20, 180, 20), limits = c(15, 190)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(20, 180, 20), limits = c(15, 190)) +
  labs(
    x = "Home Points",
    y = "Visitor Points",
    title = "NBA Scorigami",
    subtitle = "A greater density of games lies below the 45° diagonal (where Home > Visitor), illustrating the home-court advantage.",
    caption = "Data Source: kaggle.com | Project: SportsVizSunday"
  ) +
  # Larger base font size for better readability on the web
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 22, hjust = 0.5),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(color = "gray30", size = 12, hjust = 0.5, margin = margin(b = 15)),
    plot.caption = element_text(color = "gray50", size = 9, hjust = 1, face = "italic", margin = margin(t = 15)),
    panel.grid.major = element_line(color = "gray90", linewidth = 0.25),
    panel.grid.minor = element_line(color = "gray95", linewidth = 0.12),
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 11),
    legend.position = "right",
    legend.key.height = unit(1.8, "cm"),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 11, face = "bold"),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 10)
  )
```
